overall.description: A first-person perspective ride inside a futuristic metro train (NCART) from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City at night. The camera observes neon-lit cityscapes passing by through the windows and occasionally pans to show other passengers inside the car, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere with contrasting warm orange and cool cyan lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro car interior with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: seated in metro car observing the neon-lit cityscape passing by through the left window

notable_agents.action: man wearing wide-brimmed hat sitting on bench looking down at something in his lap
person standing holding yellow pole while looking out the window at passing city lights

entered.detail: brown leather bench seats with metallic armrests lining the metro car interior
thick yellow safety pole for standing passengers
glass sliding doors with metallic frames separating train cars
large blue and red neon sign with DTR lettering visible through window
blurred futuristic skyscrapers and buildings passing by outside the train window

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a futuristic metro car traveling through a cyberpunk city at night. The camera faces left toward large windows revealing blurred neon-lit skyscrapers rushing by. A man in a wide-brimmed hat sits on a brown leather bench to the left, while another passenger stands holding a yellow safety pole on the right. The interior is bathed in contrasting warm orange and cool cyan artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro car passing through commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: train passes large illuminated WOLLESEN STREET sign visible through the window

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the passing urban landscape as the train moves through the commercial district

notable_agents.action: man with hat remains seated, occasionally shifting position
standing passenger maintains grip on pole while observing outside

entered.detail: large orange neon sign reading WOLLESEN STREET passing by the window
various floating holographic billboards and advertisements in Japanese and English

segments.scene_description: The metro continues through Night City, passing the prominent WOLLESEN STREET neon sign. Various holographic advertisements and digital billboards flash by the window, including images of masks and commercial products. The same passengers remain in their positions, with the standing rider still gripping the yellow pole as the urban landscape streams past.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro car interior showing passengers on the right side

events.description: camera pans right to reveal additional passengers sitting on the opposite side of the metro car

agents.ego_description: turns attention from the window to observe other passengers inside the metro car

notable_agents.action: muscular man with white cap and blue shorts leaning against window looking outside
person in denim jacket sitting on bench looking at mobile phone

entered.detail: window frame and interior wall paneling on the right side of the train car
metallic wall panels and overhead lighting fixtures inside the train

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal the other side of the metro car interior, showing a muscular man with a white cap leaning against the window and another passenger absorbed in their mobile phone. The view temporarily shifts away from the cityscape to focus on the human elements inside the train, with warm interior lighting highlighting the metallic panels and brown seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro car returning to forward-facing city view

events.description: camera pans back left to resume viewing the passing cityscape through the window

agents.ego_description: returns to observing the neon cityscape through the window as the journey continues

notable_agents.action: man with hat still seated on the left side bench
standing passenger holding the yellow pole

entered.detail: returning view of blurred futuristic buildings and neon lights outside

segments.scene_description: The camera pans back to its original forward-facing position, resuming the view of Night City's neon skyline rushing past the window. The familiar elements of the metro interior—the brown seats, yellow safety pole, and glass doors—return to their original positions in the frame. The train continues its journey through the cyberpunk metropolis as various holographic advertisements flicker by in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective inside a futuristic metro car as it speeds through a neon-drenched urban landscape. It begins with the camera facing left toward large windows, where blurred skyscrapers rush past while a man in a wide-brimmed hat sits on a leather bench and another passenger grips a yellow safety pole. As the train maintains its momentum, the interior remains bathed in contrasting warm orange and cool cyan artificial lighting. The scene then shifts its focus to the streaming cityscape outside, where the prominent Wollesen Street neon sign emerges among a flurry of holographic advertisements and digital billboards. Finally, the camera continues to observe the flashing commercial images and masks passing by the window while the passengers remain steady in their positions.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from the intimate interior of a metro car back to the expansive, neon-lit cityscape of Night City. It begins with a pan to the right, moving away from the window to reveal a muscular man in a white cap and another passenger focused on a mobile phone amidst warm interior lighting and metallic panels. As the camera completes its sweep, the focus transitions back toward the forward-facing view, bringing the brown seats and yellow safety pole back into the frame. The scene then opens up once more to the rushing skyline, where the cool cyan glow of the metropolis and flickering holographic advertisements dominate the view through the glass.
